name: gzip
description: Compress files with the gzip algorithm

name: -k
--keep
options.description: Keep the input files instead of deleting them

name: -f
--force
options.description: Overwrite existing files and compress links

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Show the name and compression ratio of each file

name: --best
options.description: Compress better at the cost of speed

name: --fast
options.description: Compress faster at the cost of size
